**Quick dosing summary for Dr. Martinez**
- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

| CU-003 | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | 2.83 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

**Clinical notes**
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

**On PK model stability**
- From the dosing config alone, things look **internally consistent**: all three patients have current PK clearance values and active schedules.
- I do **not** see any explicit warning flags in the file.
- That said, this config file by itself does **not** confirm full PK model runtime/validation stability — only that the latest saved dosing parameters are populated and coherent.

I also saved this as a report for easy forwarding. If you want, send me Dr. Martinez’s email and I can format it into an email draft.
